title: Master Sword
description: This mod adds a few of the legendary blades from the Zelda series, mostly inspired by Skyward Sword and A Link to the Past
body:
## Overview
This mod is a Skyward Sword/A Link to the Past-inspired mod that adds the **Goddess Sword** and **Master Sword** to the game, along with variations of them. I mainly made this mod for use on a mod pack server with my friends but decided to make it public so anybody can use it if they'd like. I'd also like to add that it was created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net) It's unlikely that there'll be frequent updates if any to this, but if I have any ideas that fit it I might update it.

## Materials
The main crafting component you'll be using in this mod is the **Master Ingots**, obtained by mining and smelting **Master Ore** that can be found in the deepslate. Alternatively, Master Ingots can be crafted from **Master Dust**, which itself can also be crafted, but at a pricy cost. The other materials in this mod are the Goddess Flames; **Farore's Flame**, **Nayru's Flame**, and **Din's Flame**, which are crafted and used to upgrade the **Goddess Sword** up until it becomes the **Dull Master Sword**. There is also a **Holy Handle**, made from Master Ingots and other materials, which is used to craft the Goddess Sword.

## Swords
The swords this mod contains are obtained naturally in this order; **Goddess Sword**, **Goddess Longsword**, **Goddess White Sword**, **Dull Master Sword**, **Master Sword**, **Tempered Master Sword**, and finally the **Golden Master Sword**. These swords are crafted from their previous forms along with the new materials this mod brings to the table. I'd also like to mention that these swords are indestructible, they do not have durability and are immune to fire, so don't worry too much about them breaking!

## Final Note
If you have any questions about this mod and its contents, message me on Discord @thepolpobed
